adrs.title: Run all LLM workloads on in-tenant Azure OpenAI
adrs.context: Claims narratives contain PII and health details; data residency and Purview coverage are mandatory.
adrs.decision: Use Azure OpenAI inside the Nordkap tenant for all LLM features; no public-API calls.
adrs.consequences: Slightly behind public API on model releases; quota management becomes an ops task.

adrs.title: Event-driven scoring instead of batch
adrs.context: Fraud value concentrates at FNOL; nightly batch loses the intervention window.
adrs.decision: Stream FNOL events via Event Hub and score synchronously with a 2s budget.
adrs.consequences: Requires ClaimCenter event integration work and 24/7 service operation.

adrs.title: Vector store: Azure AI Search
adrs.context: Narrative-similarity features need vector + keyword search under existing governance.
adrs.decision: Use Azure AI Search rather than a self-hosted vector DB.
adrs.consequences: Azure lock-in accepted in exchange for Entra ID + Purview integration.
